title: selliguea lagunensis
intro: Selliguea lagunensis, also known as the Philippine polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea lagunensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of various diseases such as arthritis, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. Selliguea lagunensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
